name: memoric
description: Persistent memory layer for AI agents. Intelligent deduplication, semantic search, and unlimited retrieval for Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory layer for AI coding workflows
interface.longDescription: Memoric adds long-term memory to your AI tools. Store decisions, preferences, project context, and session state across conversations. Memories are automatically deduplicated and retrieved via semantic search.
defaultPrompt: Search my memories for recent decisions
Remember that I prefer TypeScript over JavaScript
What do you know about my coding preferences?
